item.title: Has science education failed us?
item.description: Not everyone likes science or is as devoted to it as I am, that much is true, but is that a valid excuse for not knowing the basic properties of our solar system? Are basic facts like “the Sun is a star”, “the Earth is a planet”, and “the Moon is a satellite” not important in our society? I can understand some confusion with whether Pluto is a planet or not.
